neqsim.process.safety.rupture.PipeFireRuptureStudy.Builder

Package
Description
neqsim.process.safety.rupture
Fire rupture screening for process piping segments.

  • Uses of PipeFireRuptureStudy.Builder in neqsim.process.safety.rupture

    Method
    Description

    Creates a builder for a pipe fire-rupture study.
    PipeFireRuptureStudy.Builder

    Sets the maximum simulation time.
    PipeFireRuptureStudy.Builder
    PipeFireRuptureStudy.Builder.spreadsheetGasThermalMass(boolean spreadsheetGasThermalMass)
    Selects whether gas thermal mass follows the legacy spreadsheet ideal-gas approximation.
    PipeFireRuptureStudy.Builder
    PipeFireRuptureStudy.Builder.timeStepSeconds(double timeStepSeconds)
    Sets the calculation time step.
